about_afa.title: About AFA
about_afa.subtitle: Who we are and how we organize
about_afa.mission_default: AFA (Family Association) is a non-profit made up of the school families. We support the educational project, organize activities and represent families before the school and authorities.
about_afa.composition_intro: The Board is renewed at the assembly and is made up of the following roles:
about_afa.empty: Board members have not been published yet.

families.title: Families that add up
families.desc: Every enrolled family is part of it and can join the assembly and committees.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Support the educational project and organize activities for students and families.

nonprofit.title: Non-profit
nonprofit.desc: All resources are reinvested in the school and the educational community.

cta.desc: Write to us and we'll explain how to take part in the assembly, committees or Board.

history_promo.title: Discover our history
history_promo.desc: From a school born out of community activism in the 70s to today's educational project. A story rooted in the Falguera neighbourhood.

acollida_page.seo_description: Everything you need to know about our drop-off care service: timetables, member and non-member rates, and occasional use.
acollida_page.title: Drop-off Care
acollida_page.intro: A safe, supervised space before and after school hours so families can balance work and home life with peace of mind.

schedule.title: Flexible hours
schedule.body: Available in the morning before class and in the afternoon after school, adapted to each family's needs.

team.title: Qualified team
team.body: Trained monitors look after the children with games, reading and small activities adapted to each age.

flex.title: Monthly or occasional
flex.body: Sign up for the full month or use the service on specific days whenever you need it.

acollida_page.rates_subtitle: Prices for AFA member and non-member families. Monthly or occasional.
acollida_page.note: Occasional rates apply to specific days. For sign-ups or more information, contact AFA.

cta.title: Need more information?
cta.desc: If you have questions or want to sign up for the service, write to us and we'll help you with all the details.

history.title: Our history
history.subtitle: Half a century of public schooling
history.intro: From a neighbourhood school born of community activism to the educational project that now welcomes our families. This is the story you keep writing with us every day.

origins.title: A school born from the neighbourhood
origins.p1: In the early 70s, the Falguera neighbourhood was growing with the local factories. Families arriving from across the country had no school places: more than 600 children had to take a bus to Barcelona every morning.
origins.p2: Local families organised and demanded a public school. The pressure worked: in 1971 the land was granted and construction began, right behind Palau Falguera.

quote.text: "The school went from Francoist to Catalan, and the neighbourhood from having nothing to being full of life."
quote.author: Falguera neighbourhood chronicle

modelo.title: The "school without doors"
modelo.fact: "schools without doors" in all of Spain
modelo.p1: The original building was an experimental project: open classrooms, large windows, natural light and shared spaces. One of only five of its kind in the entire country.
modelo.p2: The school grew to over 1,000 students and 38 teachers. So much life couldn't fit in one open space, and over time walls were added to create traditional classrooms.

1971.title: Construction begins
1971.desc: The City Council grants the land behind Palau Falguera to build a new public school.

1972.title: Colegio Modelo opens
1972.desc: On December 11th, one of the country's five "schools without doors" opens its gates.

1976.title: First Catalan lessons
1976.desc: Catalan is introduced in the classroom for the first time.

1985.title: Catalan immersion
1985.desc: The school fully joins the Catalan immersion programme and moves to two classes per grade.

1988.title: New name: Escola Falguera
1988.desc: The community decides to rename the school to honour the neighbourhood and mark a new era.

1997.title: New building
1997.desc: The school moves to a new building on Sant Josep street, coinciding with its 25th anniversary.

2012.title: Major renovation
2012.desc: Classrooms and common areas are modernised for current pedagogical needs.

2022.title: 50 years of school
2022.desc: Half a century of educational community in the Falguera neighbourhood.

name.title: From "Colegio Modelo" to Escola Falguera
name.desc: The community chose to rename the school to claim the neighbourhood, leave behind the connotations of an earlier era, and put down roots where the families live.
name.label: Falguera

today.title: A school in constant action
today.intro: Half a century on, Falguera is still a living project, rooted in the neighbourhood and open to the world.

green.title: Green School
green.desc: School garden, sustainability and outdoor activities thanks to our proximity to the river and Collserola.

cordes.title: Strings Project
cordes.desc: String instrument lessons in the classroom, in partnership with Palau Falguera's Municipal Music School.

steam.title: STE(AI)M
steam.desc: Science, technology, art and AI integrated into the curriculum through hands-on experiences.

community.title: AFA Community
community.desc: After-school, drop-off care and an in-house kitchen: families make daily life at school possible.

palau.title: Why "Falguera"?
palau.p1: The school is named after Palau Falguera, a 17th-century estate at the historic heart of Sant Feliu. It sits right next to us and shapes the cultural landscape of the school.
palau.p2: Today, Palau Falguera hosts the Municipal Music School and the National Rose Exhibition. Its gardens are a natural extension of our classrooms.

cta.title: You keep writing the story
cta.desc: Every new family adds a new chapter. Get to know the AFA and discover how to take part.

documents.seo_description: Download meeting minutes, school regulations, registration forms and useful resources from AFA Escola Falguera.
documents.page_description: Download space for official documents, minutes, regulations and information of interest for families.

legal.cookies_personalization_desc: To remember your preferences and settings.

home.about_text_1: The AFA is the association formed by the majority of the school's families. The board of directors is responsible for coordinating various activities. Joining the board is voluntary. Therefore, any help from you, no matter how small, will be very welcome.
home.about_text_2: The board organizes and manages extracurricular activities intended to complement the children's education, and collaborates in many other activities throughout the school year.
home.about_text_3: It also participates in organizing popular festivals: Castanyada, Tió, Sant Jordi, End of Year...
home.about_contact: For any information, you can find us at the AFA office on Mondays from 9:00 to 9:30.
about_functions: Raise awareness and guide parents regarding their responsibility for their children's education.
Channel initiatives and suggestions from parents.
Manage the acquisition and distribution of common materials and books.
Organize and manage extracurricular or complementary activities.
Participate in social and cultural activities organized at the municipal level that may be of interest to schools.
Collaborate in the school's festivals and cultural acts.

news_archive.subtitle: Keep up to date with everything happening in our school and AFA projects.

fees_page.title: AFA Fees
fees_page.subtitle: Your collaboration allows us to continue improving the educational experience for all children in the school.
fees_page.purpose_text: The AFA is a non-profit association formed by parents. The annual fee is our main source of funding to carry out projects and activities.
purpose_list: Purchase of educational and play material for the school.
Organization of traditional festivals (Castanyada, Carnival, End of Year).
Subsidizing talks and workshops for families.
Management of extracurricular activities and childcare.
fees_page.single_payment: A single payment per school year that benefits all your children.
fees_page.important_text: In the transfer concept, please: STATE THE NAME OF YOUR SON OR DAUGHTER AND THE GRADE.
fees_page.footer_note: Once the transfer is made, remember to keep the receipt in case it is necessary.

menjador_page.prices_subtitle: We distinguish between fixed pupils (half month or more + 1 day) and sporadic pupils (individual days).

featured_projects.title: Your support transforms the school
featured_projects.subtitle_prefix: We don’t just manage, we create
featured_projects.subtitle_suffix: See what we are achieving thanks to families like yours.

1.title: Smart Classroom & Living Spaces
1.description: We transform traditional classrooms into motivating environments that foster creativity and collaborative work.

2.title: Playground Renaturalization
2.description: More green, less concrete. A project to bring life to recess with shaded areas, a school garden, and inclusive play structures.

3.title: Digitalization & Open Library
3.description: We want a library that is the cultural heart of the center. Vote to approve the purchase of new furniture and e-readers.

inscription.subtitle_suffix: We simplify management so you can enjoy watching them learn and have fun.

info_box.title: How does the process work?
info_box.text: We have designed this unique form to make your life easier. You can register all your children at once. If any activity has excess demand, we guarantee a fair process respecting the order of entry.

important_info.title: Important Information
important_info.text: Activities will only take place if there are enough students. If there is an excess of students, registration order will be respected.

pricing.title: Pricing & Payment Method
pricing.offer_banner_body: If you take two identical extracurricular activities in the same week, enjoy a reduced price: 36€/month (members) and 40€/month (non-members).
pricing.discount_body: If taking two identical activities per week: 36€/month (members) and 40€/month (non-members).
pricing.english_warning_body: English classes on Tuesdays and Wednesdays are NOT paid through AFA. It is managed directly with the company.
pricing.payment_method_body: Monthly payment via bank transfer before the 10th.
pricing.iban_hint: Important! Include student name and activity in the reference.
